task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.current_state: Computed next visible birthday from authoritative cast records using today's date 2026-03-31. Search showed the earliest upcoming month-day is 04-25, and canonical file 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms exact name Claudia Reiter. No other search matches share 04-25.
